query:
SELECT m.id, m.alunoId, m.competenciaId, m.titulo, m.descricao, m.isActive, a.name as aluno_name, a.email as aluno_email
FROM metas m
JOIN alunos a ON a.id = m.alunoId
WHERE a.name LIKE '%Joseane%' OR a.email LIKE '%joseane%'
ORDER BY m.id;
command:
